name: Temple Contact
description: You can call on temple shelter and guidance.

name: Tool Mastery
description: You maintain one artisan toolkit at expert quality.

name: False Persona
description: You maintain a prepared alias and forged identity cues.

name: Underworld Contact
description: You can locate black-market information in settlements.

name: Trailblazer
description: You can chart safer routes in difficult terrain.

name: Watch Training
description: You gain an edge when spotting suspicious behavior.

name: Courtly Standing
description: You can request formal audience in aligned courts.

name: Forager
description: You can reliably gather basic food and water in the wild.

name: Research Discipline
description: You can rapidly index and summarize archives.

name: City Network
description: You know side routes and hidden passages in dense districts.
